title: Reflectify RT
description: A performance-optimized shader featuring advanced SSR reflections, realistic rain effects, and cinematic lighting for a vivid, immersive experience.
body:
![Reflectify RT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55427fedbef023bf52d8e045e6d39e616a56caa8.png)

Reflectify RT is designed to elevate your visual experience with advanced reflection techniques and cinematic lighting. It focuses on how surfaces and water interact with the world, transforming your gameplay into a vivid and realistic experience without unnecessary complexity.

![Media](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3050ac158ae37f3e100a717b4b08ff40cbcf268.png)
![ph 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f46728b8e38f65f4622bbc51d97f336c04bd322.jpeg)
![ph2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaac91e36be8ee2df4c026f0a47680db94274253.jpeg)
![ph3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be7afea7162e8d87beeb2ececc9323447cbb364e.jpeg)
![ph4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/791f6262853215e5e3f9555530ea00b1956839c8.jpeg)
![ph5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24ac310d8e9286d4533bd94dd2210531027c81ce.jpeg)
![ph6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/769a4bd0e3ac1d8141e6b4b0a87d0ad95abceebd.jpeg)
![ph7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37c7ebdd84639a737a34d329718963ba8701fba7.jpeg)
![ph8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52a639e06f8b65a1a71e7d05e86e1bc17d49e2db.jpeg)
![ph9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4e67587f8d391062f4540a687cf8ef07d028f0b.jpeg)
![ph10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a3f0b2a39d7f1e48838deb77a5c27f6d313c4d5.jpeg)
![ph11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db65dc1f6c164739ddd718be1d1bf5101125a45c.jpeg)
![Key Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a8291b53602fa07f0c7e77f6694b0244cd5e642.png)

💧 **SSR Reflections**: High-quality reflections on ice and smooth surfaces.

🌧️ **Wet Effects**: Realistic ground reflections that appear during rainfall.

🌊 **Underwater**: Crystal-clear water with natural light scattering and distortion.

☀️ **God Rays**: Soft, warm light shafts piercing through trees and buildings.

🌿 **Nature**: Smooth waving animations for leaves, grass, and plants.

![Performance & Customization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f4b99cb12ffebbfba90135d4c0c41d6657ce21e.png)

You can easily customize your experience by toggling features or adjusting reflection strength in the settings. This shader is highly optimized and runs smoothly even on low-end hardware like the GT 1030 or equivalent.
